description: Semantic layer for freight, transportation, warehousing, and supply chain operations. Covers shipment tracking, supplier performance, inventory, and cost management.

entities.name: Shipment
entities.description: A movement of goods from origin to destination
entities.operational_meaning: Primary entity for on-time delivery, cost, and transit time analytics

entities.name: Order
entities.description: A request for goods or services to be supplied or delivered
entities.operational_meaning: Links demand to supply, drives fill rate and OTIF measurement

entities.name: Carrier
entities.description: Company or entity that physically moves goods
entities.operational_meaning: Used for carrier scorecard, lane costing, and service level monitoring

entities.name: Warehouse
entities.description: Physical location where goods are stored and distributed
entities.operational_meaning: Used for utilisation, throughput, dwell time, and labour cost analysis

entities.name: Route
entities.description: A defined path between origin and destination points
entities.operational_meaning: Used for lane profitability, transit time benchmarking, and capacity planning

entities.name: Supplier
entities.description: Entity that provides goods or services in the supply chain
entities.operational_meaning: Used for supplier scorecards, lead time analysis, and risk management

entities.name: Item
entities.description: A specific product or SKU being shipped or stored
entities.operational_meaning: Links physical goods to shipments, inventory positions, and demand

vocabulary.definition: Shipments delivered on or before the promised delivery date
Orders delivered on time AND with the correct quantity and condition
vocabulary.sql_hint: delivered_on_time = TRUE AND quantity_received = quantity_ordered AND no_damage = TRUE

vocabulary.definition: Time a shipment or vehicle spends stationary at a facility
vocabulary.sql_hint: departure_time - arrival_time at a given facility or stop

vocabulary.definition: Percentage of order quantity that can be fulfilled from available stock
Order line that cannot be fulfilled due to insufficient inventory
Number of days from shipment pickup to delivery
Total cost charged for transportation services
Shipment that has not been delivered by the promised date
vocabulary.sql_hint: actual_delivery_date > promised_delivery_date OR (status != 'DELIVERED' AND promised_delivery_date < CURRENT_DATE)

suggested_questions: What is the on-time delivery rate by carrier this month?
Which shipments are currently delayed and at risk of missing their window?
Show me OTIF performance by supplier for the last quarter
What is the average transit time by lane?
Which routes have the highest freight cost per unit?
Show me fill rate trend by product category
Which warehouses have the highest dwell time this week?
How many backorder lines do we have by supplier right now?

alert_templates.name: Late Shipments Spike
alert_templates.description: High proportion of active shipments are past their promised delivery date
alert_templates.metric_hint: COUNT(*) FROM shipments WHERE promised_delivery_date < CURRENT_DATE AND actual_delivery_date IS NULL

alert_templates.name: Low Fill Rate
alert_templates.description: Order fill rate has dropped below the minimum threshold
alert_templates.metric_hint: AVG(quantity_shipped::float / NULLIF(quantity_ordered,0)) * 100 FROM orders WHERE order_date >= CURRENT_DATE - 7

alert_templates.name: Carrier OTD Degradation
alert_templates.description: A carrier's on-time delivery rate has fallen below the SLA
alert_templates.metric_hint: COUNT(CASE WHEN actual_delivery_date <= promised_delivery_date THEN 1 END)::float / COUNT(*) * 100 GROUP BY carrier
